title: doratoxylon chouxii
intro: Doratoxylon chouxii, also known as the Rattan tree, is a species of plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its sap and seeds. The health benefits of Doratoxylon chouxii include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. In herbal preparations, the plant's sap and seeds are often used to make tonics and ointments, and are also used in traditional remedies for various ailments.
